data.title: Microservices Framework
data.description: WhatsApp utilizes a microservices architecture to scale its application efficiently across millions of users worldwide.

data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Ensures that only the communicating users can read the messages, preventing even WhatsApp from decrypting them.

data.title: Datacenter Configuration
data.description: Globally distributed servers to provide fast and reliable access to users around the world.
data.technical_spec: Geographically distributed data centers, Content Distribution Networks (CDN)

data.title: Persistence Layer
data.description: Database systems optimized for quick retrieval and storage of messages and media.

data.title: Push Notification System
data.description: A robust system to ensure reliable message delivery alerts to users via their devices.
